event.description:
This is a spontaneous holiday event! Ho-ho-ho.

Come join the scalding community to learn and discuss cool things Twitter, Linkedin and Rackspace are doing with data and scalding (scala on hadoop). We have a great group of speakers lined up for this event so should be a really interesting set of presentations and discussions.

Food and drinks will be provided. Come meet new people and learn what others are doing in the scalding community!

Agenda:

6 - 6:30 Gathering, Food, Drinks

6:30 - 8:30 Talks

8:30 - ? Hangout

Lightning Talks:

Linkedin -- Matrix API in Scalding

Twitter -- Clustering Users with Locality-Sensitive Hashing in Scalding and Algebird

Rackspace -- Hidden Markov Models with Time Series Data

Breakout Sessions

You decide what you want to talk about:

Possible Topics: SummingBird, Scalding Roadmap …

Speakers:

Vitaly Gordon, Senior Data Scientist, Linkedin

Twitter Scalding Team (Oscar, Argyris, Ian)

Nick Kolegraff, Data Scientist, Rackspace
event.title: Scalding at Twitter, LinkedIn, and (+event@) Rackspace
